title: Release v0.1.34: version bump (incl. codex-plugin manifest), tag, push, propagate installer-hardening to 8 anphabe hosts + airemote commit
action: Bump BEE_VERSION in templates/lib/state.mjs + .claude-plugin/plugin.json to 0.1.34; fix stale .codex-plugin/plugin.json (0.1.18 -> 0.1.34); self-onboard beegog --apply --repo-hooks (expect recheck up_to_date, per-project targets self_skip); full verify green; commit release + annotated tag v0.1.34 + push --tags; onboard 8 anphabe hosts (exclude anphabe-crm) with the repo's own script --apply --repo-hooks; pathspec-scoped commit per host (.gitignore .bee AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md .claude .agents); commit airemote bee-scoped changes the same way. Owner chose release-without-review at the A9 question (AskUserQuestion this session).

truths: Tag v0.1.34 pushed at the release HEAD
All 8 hosts report bee 0.1.34 with both in-repo skill trees present
beegog self-onboard never wrote .claude/skills or .agents/skills into beegog

verify: git tag -l v0.1.34 | grep -q v0.1.34 && node -e "process.exit(require('fs').existsSync('.claude/skills/bee-hive')?1:0)"

trace.outcome: v0.1.34 released and propagated: tag pushed, 8 anphabe hosts + airemote on 0.1.34 with per-project skill trees, pathspec commits done (push per host = owner's call)
trace.verify_output: VERIFY-PASS: tag v0.1.34 pushed (b9bea0a); beegog self-onboard self_skip both repo targets, no in-repo skill trees; 8 anphabe hosts + airemote all report bee 0.1.34 with 15+15 skills; pathspec-scoped commits on all 9 hosts
trace.verify_command: git tag -l v0.1.34 | grep -q v0.1.34 && node -e "process.exit(require('fs').existsSync('.claude/skills/bee-hive')?1:0)"
